questionHtml:
Calculate the standard enthalpy change (ΔH⦵) for the forward reaction in kJ mol−1.

ΔH⦵f PCl3 (g) = −306.4 kJ mol−1

ΔH⦵f PCl5 (g) = −398.9 kJ mol−1

meta.title: Calculate the standard enthalpy change (ΔH⦵) for the forward reaction in kJ mol−1. ΔH⦵f PCl3 (g) = −306.4 kJ mol−1 ΔH⦵f PCl5 (g) = −398.9 kJ mol−1
